name: Iridium Communications Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview Iridium Communications Inc. (we, us, or Iridium) is a leading provider of global voice, data, and positioning, navigation and timing (PNT) satellite services. We are the only commercial provider of communications services offering true global coverage, connecting people, organizations and assets to and from anywhere, in real time.
